title: Odds
description: Exploring romantic connection and conflict and growth.
lyrics: Can you feel it now, can you hear it now Can you feel it now, what are the odds What are the odds that me, me and you, you meet me and say What are the odds that we're walking in the same path And all that relate and all that good Yeah, all the good and hard stuff you put each other through To create conflict, to grow I said, what are the odds Of you looking that good, babe What are the odds That you like my rotation, freestyle with me I said, I think I'm blessed You can look up the test I gamble on my life existence And there's no reason to sweat What are the odds That we could be good Yeah, what are the odds That we won't fuck up the number Have each other hate and taste And fly and violence, no other way dividing Yeah, yeah, what are the odds We make it past that Conflict, girl, conflict, girl, oh, oh, oh Conflict, girl, conflict, girl, oh, oh, oh The story that we tell to ourselves Over and over again till we last in hell What are the odds we got both What are the odds we get both What are the odds that we just die And then still hold the freestyle down Even when the thing comes off, man Cause that's what we do, what are the odds That even when you have to adapt You come through, you teach that with truth Respect and humility Yeah, what are the odds, baby What are the odds that you actually see me In the thing that's good for you Yeah, baby, what are the odds When we're rolling I can't think of anybody but you What are the odds that you think the same way About me, about flow, about all the different Records, radio, window seals I'm not pouting, I'm just trying to Have us grow, grow, grow Have us be, no, no, have us be like Better than we ever saw before So light for me, I wanna be the Goddamn star in the galaxy of your heart What are the odds you want that too What are the odds you just Go against it all just to spite Me and you when we're walking down the streets S-I-N, S-I-N, yeah Me and you when we're swinging in the swings K-I-S-S-I-N, S-I-N Don't worry which way they frame you Redecorate that bitch, maybe send it down And put a new color on that glue What are the odds it's me and you What are the odds this is what I do And get some change from the people, baby Know that we all use a different point of view Reflect the light, uh Catch that shit in the night, you know Don't want it to go away So I gotta stay true to my soul, no truth Don't push it, what are the odds What are the odds of me and you Ending spectacularly What are the odds we make it through What are the odds we come together, baby What are the odds that you were meant for me I do the math, do the division Do subtraction, addition Multiply with some kids Some irrational condition of your mind Yeah, what are our odds Are we going for broke M-U, M-U, emulation In the foundation of foundation I got something in the simulation That tells me we got good odds Or to be all fucked up Hell, do it anyway That's the pressure that you do In this life, white strife I can't understand your Devoid feeling of control What are the odds What are the odds that you would be like so cool
